era: 1992-1998 core. Grunge/Indie. E=6 -- melodic weight, mid-energy grunge with indie rock sophistication. Fremont, Seattle. Portland-Seattle axis.
associated_musicians: Brad (Stone Gossard, Shawn Smith, Regan Hagar)

theory_nodes.concept: FIVE-SIXTHS MARK: 300/360 = 83.3%. Penultimate major structural milestone. Five of six segments complete. Sixty degrees remain. The arc of the full rotation is visible from here.
theory_nodes.description: Degree 300 is the engine's five-sixths structural marker. The most precise fraction since three-quarters at degree 270.

theory_nodes.concept: Return cluster 297-300 closes: Skin Yard, Treepeople, Love Battery, Pond. Two C/Z (297-298) then two Sub Pop (299-300). Energy: E=7, E=8, E=6, E=6. Cluster consolidates Seattle history before final sixth.
theory_nodes.description: The four-degree return cluster closes at the five-sixths mark.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop double-return 299-300 closes: Love Battery + Pond. C/Z to Sub Pop infrastructure transition mirroring historical transition complete.
theory_nodes.description: Sub Pop carries the engine to the five-sixths mark.

theory_nodes.concept: SPS 300 Pileated Woodpecker: third appearance, engine namesake at five-sixths mark. Callback to degree 108 double-maximum. Escalation: E=5 (54) → E=6 (108) → E=7 (300).
theory_nodes.description: The species that defines the engine's acoustic ambition returns at its major structural milestone.

cross_references.relationship: First appearance E=6, Grunge/Indie. Portland-Seattle axis. Charlie Campbell. Brad/Satchel connection.
Return cluster opens at 297. C/Z Records.
E=8 peak of return cluster. C/Z closes.
Sub Pop opens at 299. One degree before milestone.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6 + E=7 = E=13. Five-sixths mark pairing. Engine namesake species at major structural milestone. Callback to degree 108 double-maximum. Pileated escalates: E=5 (54) → E=6 (108) → E=7 (300).

structural_note: Degree 300 is the engine's five-sixths structural marker. 300 degrees complete. 60 degrees remain (301-360). The five-sixths mark is the final major structural milestone before the closing rotation.
